founder_input.product_description: Demeo helps technical B2B founders turn their product into a guided buyer demo. A prospect receives a link to an AI-led experience that explains the product, answers questions, qualifies the opportunity, and prepares follow-up for the founder.
founder_input.target_customer: technical B2B startup founders selling software
founder_input.prospect_description: a founder evaluating whether Demeo can demo their own startup
demo_goals: show what a founder provides during setup
show how content or agent output is generated
show the founder what they receive after a prospect finishes the demo
founder_input.founder_walkthrough: Start by showing how the founder enters company and product context. Then show the agent/content console where AI output can be generated from that context. Then show the prospect demo room where a buyer can ask questions. Finally show the CRM summary and follow-up output that qualifies the lead. Emphasize that the final product sends a prospect a personalized link and the AI demo agent guides them.

approved_qa.question: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_qa.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_qa.question: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_qa.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.

approved_qa.question: Can this support voice?
approved_qa.answer: Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

qualification_questions: What product do you want Demeo to demo?
Do you have a safe sandbox or staging account?

crawl_pages.title: About — Demeo
crawl_pages.visible_text:
Demeo
№ 001 · OPERATOR
HOME
SETUP
AGENTS
DASHBOARD
DEMO ROOM
CRM
ABOUT
LAUNCH APP
→
VOL. I — ISSUE 02
THE PEOPLE BEHIND THE OPERATOR
EST. ZBS
ABOUT № 01
Built by people who believed sales could be smarter
.

Demeo was founded on a simple conviction — that the best sales motion is one that never sleeps, never misses context, and treats every buyer as an individual.

§ I — FOUNDERS
Three builders. One operator.
DK
CO-FOUNDER
Daria Konstantinova

Daria brings deep product intuition and a relentless focus on user experience. She leads the vision for how AI agents communicate with buyers — making every demo room feel human, not robotic.

GL
CO-FOUNDER
Grigorii Lukianov

Grigorii architects the AI pipeline that powers Demeo end-to-end. From prospect research to demo delivery, he ensures every agent in the chain is fast, accurate, and production-ready.

DI
CO-FOUNDER
Din Iskakov

Din drives go-to-market strategy and the commercial engine behind Demeo. He has a background in scaling B2B sales motions and believes the future of revenue is autonomous, not manual.

§ II — MISSION
We believe the next generation of revenue teams will be mostly AI.

Not because people aren't valuable — but because repetitive, scalable tasks should never consume the best hours of the sharpest minds. We build the operator so you don't have to.

© ZBS — DEMEO
BUILT FOR THE FUTURE OF GO-TO-MARKET
END — ISSUE 02

flows.goal: Show the full story from founder setup to prospect demo to CRM follow-up.

steps.say: First, the founder adds company and product context.
Next, that context feeds the GTM pipeline and agent stages.
The system can generate GTM content from the profile.
Then the prospect gets a personalized demo room.
Finally, the founder sees the qualified lead and follow-up.

approved_answers.topic: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_answers.topic: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_answers.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

notes: Clicks were avoided except where they are ordinary navigation links; no non-navigational clicks were added.
Selector hints use only crawled page data.
CRM send actions are visible but not approved as actions because they initiate outbound messaging.

decisions.question: What does the founder need to provide?
